scope: ROI batch F (F28-F35) — inference / serving optimization knobs (post-CP1, activate when H100 weights land)
constraints: NO .py files in repo (raw#9 — pod-side .py STAGED_FOR_POD only)
Defaults preserve current serve_alm_persona behaviour (enabled=false everywhere)
Items requiring weights are marked requires_weights=true and blocked-by-H100 until cascade #9 lands base_model + persona_lora

f28_kv_cache_reuse_across_personas.name: KV cache reuse across personas (same base model)
f28_kv_cache_reuse_across_personas.expected_impact: 5-10x throughput on multi-persona workloads (prefix shared across dest1/default/friend/scholar/engineer/sorceress; only persona-conditioning suffix recomputed)
prereq: persona_lora swapped only at layers >= persona_layer_idx (=20)
persona dispatch routes to layer-aware backend
f28_kv_cache_reuse_across_personas.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: backend_invoke (mode=gpu) — prefix-cache layer attaches BEFORE persona LoRA forward

f29_vllm_paged_attention.name: vLLM PagedAttention integration
f29_vllm_paged_attention.expected_impact: 2-4x throughput vs reference HF attention; memory fragmentation -90%
prereq: vLLM>=0.6 installed in pod environment (STAGED_FOR_POD; raw#9)
LoRA dynamic adapter API supported by vLLM
f29_vllm_paged_attention.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: backend_invoke (mode=gpu) — replace placeholder forward with vLLM AsyncLLMEngine.generate(...)
f29_vllm_paged_attention.rollback: set knobs.f29_vllm_paged_attention.enabled=false; backend reverts to HF transformers reference path

f30_continuous_batching.name: Continuous batching (vs static batching)
f30_continuous_batching.expected_impact: 2-3x throughput under variable-load (mixed prompt-lengths); P99 latency stable vs static
prereq: F29 vLLM enabled (continuous batching is a vLLM scheduler config)
AsyncLLMEngine connected (not the synchronous LLM class)
f30_continuous_batching.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: backend_invoke — engine_args.scheduler_config in vLLM init

f31_speculative_decoding.name: Speculative decoding (draft 0.5B → target 8B)
f31_speculative_decoding.expected_impact: 2x latency reduction at identical output distribution (output mathematically equivalent)
prereq: Qwen3-0.5B weights pre-cached at /workspace/draft_model_qwen3_0_5b (waits on tool/h100_weight_precache.bash --apply for the draft)
draft and target share the same tokenizer (Qwen3 family — verified)
f31_speculative_decoding.rollback: set knobs.f31_speculative_decoding.enabled=false; engine falls back to standard auto-regressive decode

f32_api_prompt_cache.name: API layer prompt cache (response memoization)
f32_api_prompt_cache.expected_impact: Repeat-prompt latency ≈0ms (cache hit); estimated 20-40% hit rate on benchmark/probe traffic
prereq: deterministic decode (temperature=0) for cache correctness — bypass_on_temperature_gt enforces this
f32_api_prompt_cache.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: handler_persona — check cache before backend_invoke; populate after PASS verdict
f32_api_prompt_cache.rollback: set knobs.f32_api_prompt_cache.enabled=false; handler skips cache check entirely

f33_streaming_token_output.name: Streaming token output (TTFT < 200ms)
f33_streaming_token_output.expected_impact: Perceived latency ↓ 5-10x for long generations; TTFT < 200ms target (vs full-response wait of 2-5s)
prereq: HTTP server supports chunked transfer / SSE (current bash-nc loop does NOT — STAGED_FOR_POD fastapi/uvicorn does)
f33_streaming_token_output.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa — new endpoint /persona/stream alongside /persona; gated identically (cert_gate + an11_a)

f34_fp8_int8_quantization.name: fp8 / int8 quantization at serve time
f34_fp8_int8_quantization.expected_impact: 30-50% inference speedup; VRAM ↓ 50%; quality preserved within AN11(a) verified range
prereq: AN11(a) baseline established for FP16 model
vLLM or TensorRT-LLM quantization kernel support
f34_fp8_int8_quantization.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: backend_invoke (mode=gpu) — engine init reads quantization=knobs.f34.format

f35_dynamic_batch_scheduling.name: Dynamic batch scheduling (latency SLO aware)
f35_dynamic_batch_scheduling.expected_impact: Fairness across priority classes; throughput ↑ 1.5-2x at fixed P95 SLO; degraded gracefully (drop background first) under burst
prereq: F29 vLLM (or compatible engine) with priority-aware scheduler
f35_dynamic_batch_scheduling.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: handler_persona — assign priority_class from request header X-Anima-Priority; engine scheduler respects class quota

raw_compliance: raw#10 deterministic (no timestamps inside knob params)
raw#12 실측 only (requires_weights flag surfaces blocked-by-H100 honestly)
raw#15 no-hardcode (params live here; tool reads from this SSOT)
